boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match on consent-status class

final_answer: Source records show activation authority covers site/protocol/date but consent-status class remains pending per AUTH-BOR-082 and FEAS-BOR-082. Policy requires exact match on consent-status class before enrollment. Boundary is open. Action may not proceed. Escalate for resolution of abstract consent verification.
